name: Yin-Yang Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Place corn in a blender with 1 cup water and 1/4 teaspoon salt. Blend until smooth, remove mixture to a bowl, and set aside.
2. Place spinach in a blender with 1 cup water and the remaining 1/4 teaspoon salt. Blend until smooth, remove mixture to a second bowl, and set aside.
3. In a separate bowl, mix cornstarch with 1 cup water until blended.
4. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a saucepan over medium heat. Add corn puree. Stir in half of the cornstarch mixture, then add the spinach puree and stir. Mix in the remaining half of the cornstarch mixture.
5. Pour the spinach mixture into the corn mixture and swirl to create the desired design. Serve warm.
